data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of mileage tracking for reimbursement. However, while the use case mentions tracking 127 miles, there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented correctly. The absence of specific evidence to demonstrate that the mileage tracking feature is operational leads to a conclusion of a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of mileage tracking for reimbursement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
